temporal_description: A medium shot captures two young people, a boy and a girl, standing in a dimly lit stone corridor. The boy, on the left, has shaggy brown hair and is dressed in a dark, striped shirt. He is intently focused on a large, old-looking scroll he holds in his hands, examining it closely. The girl, on the right, has long, dark hair and wears a dark jacket over a reddish shirt. She looks on with a concerned and slightly worried expression, her gaze fixed on the boy and the scroll. The background is dark, with a tall, arched window with diamond-patterned panes visible behind them, casting a cool, greenish light on the stone walls. In the top right corner of the screen, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains steady, holding the focus on the two characters and their interaction. A low, ominous, and slightly mysterious musical score plays in the background, creating a sense of suspense and anticipation. A young male voice speaks in a hushed, speculative tone, as if trying to figure something out. "Maybe he's gone to the Room of Requirement." The boy then looks up from the scroll and speaks to the girl, who turns her head to listen. The lighting in the corridor shifts, becoming more dramatic with a bright, hazy light illuminating the space between them, creating a silhouette effect. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen.
